assumptions: Occurrence history is merged by the exported occurrence_id (same venue + local date/time, even when multiple Eventbrite listings exist).
Reservations come from Eventbrite order.tickets_per_order; Eventbrite order counts stay separate from ticket totals.
If order-level rows are incomplete, the final point is adjusted to land on events_overview.json totals; if no order rows exist, the chart falls back to a show-day total point.
